results.title: Large gatherings and small talk – I used to think they were superficial but I now see how they keep us close
results.description: Large family gatherings once felt shallow to this writer, who thought real connection required an extended amount of time together and frequent deep conversations. Now, she sees how small talk, shared food, and simply showing up can keep loved ones close in a time-starved society.
